productDisplayName: Aneri Women Blue & White Salwar Suit
description: Style Note Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details Kurta churidar set with dupatta Blue printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, bead embellishments along the neckline, short sleeves and a vented hem Dull blue chudidhar, has a drawstring waist and tapering hems Blue and white chiffon dupatta Length of dupatta: 223 cm (approximate) Material and Care Blended fabric Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Model Statistics The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
